uploadDescription: Add the images you want to turn into PDF pages.
pasteHint: Click, drag images here, or paste from your clipboard.
supportedFormatsLabel: Supports browser-readable PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF, BMP, and AVIF images.
localOnlyNote: Images stay in this browser session and are not uploaded.
queueDescription: Review, rotate, and order images before generating the PDF.
emptyQueueDescription: Add images to build the PDF page order.
settingsDescription: Choose page size, orientation, fit, margin, and image quality.
pageSizeDescription: Each image becomes one PDF page.
fitModeDescription: Contain keeps the full image visible; cover fills the page and may crop edges.
qualityDescription: Higher quality keeps more detail and creates a larger PDF.
marginDescription: White space around each image, in millimeters.
resultDescription: Download the generated PDF when processing completes.
emptyResultDescription: Add images, adjust settings, then generate the PDF.
duplicateFileError: That image is already in the page queue.
invalidImageTypeError: Only image files can be added.
invalidImageError: One image could not be read. Try another file or format.
canvasUnavailableError: This browser environment cannot render images for PDF export.
generateFailedError: PDF generation failed. Try fewer images or smaller files.
noImagesError: Add at least one image before generating a PDF.
